description: MLX model candidates for guarded LES RAG experiments. These are not production defaults until they pass runtime smoke, retrieval baseline, guarded chat baseline, and validator probes.

candidates.notes: Current local default. OptiQ mixed-precision quantization; passed one guarded chat smoke.
Current validator. Heavier than desired, but passed simple VERIFIED/HALLUCINATION probes.

Smaller than current validator. Direct validator gauntlet passed 6/8, but failed wrong_question and empty_context; not safe as default. After single-LLM policy it passed one guarded chat case, but a fuller run labeled evacuation_width as NO_DATA and then stopped on the memory guard.
Alternative quant of the current instruct validator. Not OptiQ, but closer to current validation behavior than a base 2B model.
Smaller than current validator. Direct validator gauntlet passed 4/8 and over-accepted unsupported answers as VERIFIED. Do not use as validator; chat role remains untested.
Smaller than current validator. Direct validator gauntlet passed 2/8 and did not reliably follow the one-word label format. Do not use as validator; chat role remains untested.
Apache-2.0 non-Qwen quality candidate. Bigger memory footprint; use guarded one-case first.
Reasoning-heavy candidate. Qwen-derived distill, so not a pure family escape; watch latency and verbosity.
